reviews.name: Laith Zghoul
reviews.text:
Our first breakfast & V60 coffee in Albania made my birthday special thanks to Grasi
The Japanese omelette is heavenly delicious, the Colombian V60 was just perfect, and the service & friendliness is top notch!
Also, the Albanian pancakes and Tiramisu balls are to die for!!
Thank you again Grasi

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Elina Eli
reviews.text:
We ordered V60, Japanese omelet, Albanian pancake, and tiramisu balls -  everything was absolutely delicious!!! 🤍
And such a lovely girl Grasi working there, so warm and friendly. Highly recommend this place to everyone!

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Dominika Wy
reviews.text: very good ;)

reviews.name: Disi Resuli
reviews.text: Perfect coffe. The service was great, I suggest this place.

reviews.name: Grisilda mukaj
reviews.text: super

reviews.name: Emine Torishta
reviews.text:
Një vend me stil modern dhe shumë i ngrohtë, ku çdo detaj të jep ndjesinë e rehatisë dhe qetësisë ☕✨
Atmosfera minimaliste, drita e butë dhe organizimi perfekt e bëjnë ideal për një kafe cilësore apo një moment relaksi.
Dhe mbi të gjitha, buzëqeshja dhe shërbimi i mrekullueshëm i banakieres Emanuela e bëjnë eksperiencën edhe më të veçantë 🤍
reviews.textTranslated:
A place with a modern style and very warm, where every detail gives you the feeling of comfort and tranquility ☕✨
The minimalist atmosphere, soft lighting and perfect organization make it ideal for a quality coffee or a moment of relaxation.
And above all, the smile and wonderful service of the bartender Emanuela make the experience even more special 🤍

reviews.name: Arjeta Torishta
reviews.text: Super cdogje😊

reviews.name: Iljana Veizi
reviews.text: Very nice place to stay in. The staff was very kind and friendly.

reviews.name: Marlon Tchaikoski
reviews.text: So amazing to hang out with friends!! I loved the experience

reviews.name: Alger Karriqi
reviews.text: Seriously the best place i have been to in tirana. The food is really amazing, the atmosphere is top tier and super vintage aesthetic. Service is amazing and the waiter was super nice. Now for the best thing there is an entire game section where u can play whatever board game u like and theres a bunchhh of them and it was really really cheap. I will definitely be back and i really recommend

reviews.name: Shannon Murtagh
reviews.text: Great place to spend a few hours me and my family loved it. Good chocolate muffins kids had lots of fun

reviews.name: Endri Grëmi
reviews.text: I love this game bar, its so much fun to come with your friends here

title: D'Angelo Chocolate & Coffee (Coin)
address: Rruga Papa Gjon Pali II 1001, Tiranë, Albania

reviews.name: Vibeke Rivet
reviews.text: Great treats and coffee! Adjola was a great server!

reviews.name: Lilly Kolb
reviews.text: Adjola was a sweetie, the food was so good and they serve you right at your seat!

reviews.name: Addison
reviews.text: Ushqimi dhe pijet ishin shume te Mira dhe gjithashtu goca qe na sherbeu Adjola ishte shume e sjellshme keni nje staff fantastic.
reviews.textTranslated: The food and drinks were very good and also the waitress who served us, Adjola, was very polite. You have a fantastic staff.

reviews.name: Ersa Hebeja
reviews.text: Ambjent i kendshem, ushqim i mire dhe vajza qe na sherbeu, Adjola ishte shume e sjellshme.
reviews.textTranslated: Nice atmosphere, good food, and the girl who served us, Adjola, was very polite.

reviews.name: Joana Llato
reviews.text: Nje eksperience shume e mire tek d angelo , Goca qe na sherbeu Adjola ishte shume e sjellshme👌
reviews.textTranslated: A very good experience at d'Angelo, the lady who served us Adjola was very kind👌

reviews.name: Klara Cmeta
reviews.text: "Ëmbëlsirat më të mira në qytet! Çdo gjë që kemi porositur ishte super e freskët dhe e shijshme. Shërbimi ishte i shpejtë dhe stafi shumë i sjellshëm(Fabiola)
reviews.textTranslated: "The best desserts in town! Everything we ordered was super fresh and delicious. The service was fast and the staff very polite (Fabiola)

reviews.name: satbere cengu
reviews.text: Ambient i bukur dhe staf i sjellshem goca qe na sherbeu ishte Fabiola
reviews.textTranslated: Beautiful environment and friendly staff, the lady who served us was Fabiola

reviews.name: Ergis Elmazi
reviews.text: Das Dessert-Restaurant war wirklich hervorragend. Die Atmosphäre war angenehm, die Süßspeisen waren frisch und unglaublich lecker. Besonders hervorheben möchte ich den Service – Fabiola war sehr freundlich, aufmerksam und außerdem wunderschön. Man hat sich direkt willkommen gefühlt. Ich komme auf jeden Fall wieder!
reviews.textTranslated: The dessert restaurant was truly outstanding. The atmosphere was pleasant, the sweets were fresh and incredibly delicious. I'd especially like to commend the service – Fabiola was very friendly, attentive, and also beautiful. I immediately felt welcome. I will definitely be back!

reviews.name: aurel hasani
reviews.text: Ambient shume i qete dhe i bukur stafi shume i mire dhe ndihmues sidomos Fabiola
reviews.textTranslated: Very quiet and beautiful environment, very nice and helpful staff, especially Fabiola.

updatesFromCustomers.text: Güzel kokteyler güzel işletmecilelik f/p aperol spritz 3.5€

reviews.name: Lorena Meça
reviews.text: Very friendly staff, cozy place with nice drinks. Also a very pretty cat who was very lovely. Drinks were cheap and delicious. Would definitely recommend .

reviews.name: VIDA Chelem
reviews.text: Fantastic coffee and service!

reviews.name: Alexis Rinker
reviews.text: Small, local spot with good coffee and quick service. We were quickly taken care of and the man who made our cappuccinos was very nice and helpful. Great experience

reviews.name: Ermira B
reviews.text: Piccolo e accogliente. In una buona posizione, ottimo per breve sosta.
reviews.textTranslated: Small and cozy. In a good location, perfect for a short stop.

reviews.name: Jędrzej Ziółkowski
reviews.text:
Niepozorne ale bardzo przypadło nam do gustu.
Zestaw obowiazkowy Raki + piwo Korca
Zawsze w dodatku orzeszki .
A z rana smaczne espresso lub latte z biszkoptem :)
Moznq tez obejrzeć mecz.
reviews.textTranslated:
It's unassuming, but we really liked it.

The must-have set: Raki + Korca beer.

Always with peanuts.

And in the morning, a delicious espresso or latte with sponge cake :)
You can also watch the game.

reviews.name: Kamil Kliczbor
reviews.text: Bardzo przyjemna atmosfera, schludnie, ale przede wszystkim przesympatyczna obsługa. Lokal na odpoczynek przy kawce, piwku czy raki.
reviews.textTranslated: A very pleasant atmosphere, clean, and above all, extremely friendly service. A great place to relax with a coffee, a beer, or raki.

reviews.name: Dominika Wancewicz
reviews.text: Najtańsza kawa chyba w całej Albanii, duża, pyszna, z ciasteczkiem. Jedyne 300 lek
reviews.textTranslated: Probably the cheapest coffee in all of Albania, large, delicious, with a cookie. Only 300 lek.

reviews.name: Ryan Bevan
reviews.text: As I do every morning, I need coffee. So I found Sophie caffe, and had a coffee, staff here are absolute legends, super friendly and accommodating. Coffee was incredibly delicious. Sat there watching the city move. Very cool spot. I highly recommend having a legendary coffee at Sophies on the corner

reviews.name: Thomas Seidel
reviews.text: Best espresso in town. Cozy and charming. The service is attentive and pleasantly friendly.

reviews.name: Sou Chabo
reviews.text:
Keine Kartenzahlung. Da wir heute unseren letzten Tag in Albanien haben hatten wir nur noch Geld in der Währung Euro dabei . Die Rechnung betrug 520 ALL. Wir haben dem Kellner 50€ gegeben und 40€ zurück bekommen . Auf Nachfrage sagte der Keller uns 520 ALL seien mehr als 10€,er sei uns noch entgegengekommen.
Der kaffe war gut .. aber ihr solltet Geld in der Landeswährung dabeihaben .
reviews.textTranslated:
No card payments allowed. Since today was our last day in Albania, we only had Euros with us. The bill came to 520 ALL. We gave the waiter €50 and received €40 back. When we asked, the waiter told us 520 ALL was more than €10 and that he had already given us a discount.

The coffee was good... but you should have local currency with you.

reviews.name: massimiliano mauro
reviews.text:
Cameriere scortese e antipatico cibo nella norma
Esperienza pessima
reviews.textTranslated:
Rude and unpleasant waiter, average food
Terrible experience

reviews.name: Bedirhan ALKURT
reviews.text: Really nice place. Good staff good service good product. No doubt to try.

reviews.name: Bee Elizabeth
reviews.text: 🖤 My favourite Sophie caffe!

reviews.name: Shahaf Hazaz
reviews.text: Very good coffee, fair prices, and the muffin and cookie was great

reviews.name: Sam Barr
reviews.text: Lovelt spot for a beer or coffee!

reviews.name: hamjon07
reviews.text: Sehr leckerer und frischer Smoothie!
reviews.textTranslated: Very delicious and fresh smoothie!

reviews.name: Benji Derdeyn
reviews.text: Amazing coffee and fresh squeezed juices. Found this during my first days after moving to Tirana and now it’s the only place I can go in the neighborhood. Fairly priced and delicious

reviews.name: Eric B
reviews.text:
Un excellent café et bar qui sert des jus de fruits frais.
Deco sympa et original , service impeccable…c’était super
Je recommande
reviews.textTranslated:
An excellent cafe and bar serving fresh fruit juices.
Nice and original decor, impeccable service...it was great.
I recommend it.

reviews.name: Łukasz Michaluk
reviews.text: Bardzo dobre smoothie, w przystępnej cenie. Szczególnie dobry jabłkowo bananowy. Restauracja ma fajny klimat, widać że dużo lokalnych ludzi tutaj przychodzi.
reviews.textTranslated: Very good smoothies, reasonably priced. The apple-banana one is especially good. The restaurant has a nice atmosphere, and it's clear that many locals come here.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello ☺️ 
we are very  happy to have you , and also that you liked our products 🫶🏻

reviews.name: step rydz
reviews.text: One of many good places where you can have €2 freshly squeezed juices.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
❤️ thank  you, 
which one did you  tried ? 
also did you noticed that the juices are made in slowjuicer it makes the juice taste difetent from the others ? 
Let us know ☺️☺️

updatesFromCustomers.text: Tiramusu ve cikolata toplardan denedik.Harikaydı.Fiyatlar biraz yüksek, mekan muhteşem.

reviews.name: Anyla
reviews.text:
Very delicious cakes and good service.

I was pleasantly surprised by the flavor of the cakes. They tasted like real pistachios and real forest fruits. The espresso was also pretty good. The frappe was prepared well but it was too milky for me. The interior was also beautiful.

reviews.name: İbrahim Tuğrul
reviews.text: Bu trileçeyse biz bugüne kadar ne yemişiz dedirten bir trileçe..
reviews.textTranslated: This trileçe (a type of Turkish dessert) makes you wonder what you've been eating all this time...

reviews.name: Roeld.R. Tauzi
reviews.text: Provato solo il caffe (2 volte), era top 🔝
reviews.textTranslated: Only tried the coffee (twice), it was top 🔝

reviews.name: Ben Blaker
reviews.text: Desserts look good, but coffee overpriced. 400ALL for a mid cappuccino!

reviews.name: Claudia Pagani
reviews.text:
1 euro e 50 per un caffè ☕️  a Tirana, Albania, è veramente esagerato! Quando la media è 70 cents / 1 euro .Nemmeno in Italia questi prezzi.
Non consigliato!
reviews.textTranslated:
€1.50 for a coffee ☕️ in Tirana, Albania, is truly exaggerated! When the average is 70 cents per €1. Not even in Italy these prices.
Not recommended!

reviews.name: T.2B
reviews.text: bonnes pâtisseries à prix correct en plein centre ville
reviews.textTranslated: Good pastries at reasonable prices right in the city center

reviews.name: aleTUTU j
reviews.text:
Locale molto curato, ordinato e pulito, personale veramente molto gentile, ti fanno sentire a tuo agio, dolci tipici albanesi e non, caffè da dieci.
Esperienza estremamente positiva! (parlano anche italiano)
reviews.textTranslated:
Very well-kept, tidy, and clean place. The staff is truly friendly and makes you feel at home. They serve traditional Albanian and other desserts, and offer excellent coffee.

A truly positive experience! (They also speak Italian.)

title: RUBI Cakes & Specialty Coffee - Kika 2
address: Kompleksi Kika 2, Rruga Anton Lufi, Tiranë, Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: I'm not a cupcake person, but my dear goddess, the Kyoto cupcakes are to die for!! My favorite item at Rubi is the Kyoto cake, but since my waistline can't afford a cake a day, the cupcake is a good way to go. It's smooth, it has a balanced richness, and just perfection. Yummy 😋

ownerUpdates.text:
Specialty Coffee at Rubi ☕

At Rubi Cakes & Specialty Coffee, we focus on carefully selected specialty coffee, single origin beans, and professional espresso preparation.
Every cup is balanced, aromatic, and crafted for those who truly appreciate quality coffee.

📍 Visit our second location and experience specialty coffee in Tirana.

reviews.name: Selena Dushi
reviews.text: Very good service, the staff very friendly and the coffee was perfect 👌🏻

reviews.name: Domna Banakou
reviews.text: Hands down the best specialty coffee in Tirana, and honestly, some of the best I've had internationally. They source high quality single-origin beans from around the world, but the real magic is in the execution. The baristas are true masters of their craft! Whether it' a latte, a flat white, or most importantly a pour-over, the extraction is perfectly consistent every single time. ​The cakes are also incredible and pair beautifully with the drinks. If you are a coffee enthusiast, this is a must-visit!

reviews.name: Bohuš Balko
reviews.text: The best coffee and cakes in Tirana! 👌

reviews.name: Noely Santos
reviews.text: I love their coffee, cupcakes, cakes, matcha, the conversation...The place is so cute...

reviews.name: Manuel
reviews.text: The matcha is one of the bests!

reviews.name: Lisa Melnikova
reviews.text: Very good💚

title: Ruka's Bar 1991
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by this business 2 weeks ago

reviews.name: Rod
reviews.text:
Great little spot in Tirana!
Cold beer, tasty sandwiches and really good fries. The atmosphere is relaxed and full of character. Perfect place to chill in the evening. Will definitely visit again!

reviews.name: Ada R
reviews.text: Great place in the heart of Tirana 👌

reviews.name: Nic Hardwick
reviews.text: Visited Albania for a week away, this bar was our favourite. Cool decor, super friendly staff, ice cold beer served in frozen glasses. Couldnt help but come back frequently.

reviews.name: tony cooper
reviews.text: Its a nice place to sit and watch the world pass, waiter was friendly pity we got stiffed with the watered down drinks prices are more than elsewhere ,we thought more expensive better quality ...not so

reviews.name: Albano Hila
reviews.text: Nice bar !

reviews.name: Nasfin Nazer
reviews.text: Amazing service and ambience, loved it💗

reviews.name: Emma
reviews.text: Nice bar in retro style, great cocktails. I recommend it! ✌️

reviews.name: Dick van Houwelingen
reviews.text:
Super leuke locatie in het centrum van Tirana.
Lekker wat gedronken, goede service en schoon.
reviews.textTranslated:
Super nice location in the center of Tirana.
Enjoyed a drink, good service, and it was clean.

title: Komiteti Bar
address: Rruga Papa Gjon Pali II, Tiranë, Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Loved my experience at Komiteti Bar. The drinks were great and the vibe was unique, but Lorger truly made the difference. He was kind, fast, and very professional definitely the best waiter!

reviews.name: Robert Ventura
reviews.text: Cuidado turista, si no llevas efectivo en Leks, y llevas euros, te intentarán cobrar de más.  Te dirán que la tarjeta no te funciona y te querrán cobrar en Euros con sobrecargo. Una pena, el turismo es un nuevo motor de su economía, pero siempre ha habido y habrá gente que se aprovecha
reviews.textTranslated: Tourists beware! If you're carrying euros instead of cash in Lek, they'll try to overcharge you. They'll claim your card isn't working and then try to charge you in euros with an extra fee. It's a shame, as tourism is a new engine of their economy, but there have always been, and always will be, people who take advantage.

reviews.name: Kapkapchmurko
reviews.text: Food was tasty but we waited 1 hour for it at 12 am, and there weren't many people at that time 😄 Still worth a visit but be prepared that you need to wait a bit long

reviews.name: Muhammad “Ray” Rahman
reviews.text: oh, can I say… One of the best experiences, one of the best servers, one of the best atmospheres and vibes that we have had in Tirana so far! Our server, Redi, was excellent, friendly and should be employee of the month every month! Thanks guys and we will be back again for sure!

reviews.name: Jörg Eichhorn
reviews.text:
Kometiti is a nice place but they are cheated us. Somehow it was rediculous, we did a Raki Tasting - 8 shots. Second round shot glases half size as  of the first round. When we complained we got the explanation that the first round was a mistake and that we were lucky. But we observed others ordering Raki received the bigger glases as we at the 1. Round. Same mistake again????
So, take care, doing a Raki Tasting!
Manager and Staff are very well educated, giving explanation.....

reviews.name: Kryštof Bohuslav
reviews.text: Terrible service, took an hour to order a Beer, avoid it in busy times.

reviews.name: Wayne O'Connor
reviews.text: Awful service, waited 45 minutes for a single drink and asked 3 times just to be constantly ignored on top of being overpriced.

reviews.name: Thomas Cuscito
reviews.text: Service très lent.. spritz sans goût.. à éviter 😅
reviews.textTranslated: Very slow service... tasteless spritz... avoid it 😅

reviews.name: Hans Lemmers
reviews.text: Matige servies heel erg lang wachten op je bestelling ( anderhalf uur op eten) erg in efficiënt
reviews.textTranslated: Mediocre service, very long wait for your order (an hour and a half for food), very inefficient

peopleAlsoSearch.title: HANA Corner Café - Specialty Coffee and Brunch

reviews.name: TopFlop Gaming
reviews.text: Great Cappuccino awesome Staff. Outside you can have a chat with the Blloku people. Nice to sit and watch the world go by.

reviews.name: Aviv Elya
reviews.text: Atmosphere is very nice and chill, the service was good, lots of coffee options, maybe a few more options for the food could be nice (although the croissant is good) 😋

reviews.name: Melih
reviews.text: Kahveler çok güzel oturma alanları gayet yeterli
reviews.textTranslated: The coffee is very good and the seating areas are quite adequate.

reviews.name: Nahshon
reviews.text:
Specialty coffee for very reasonable price. The cappuccino was very fragrant, and it was very tasty. We also bought an iced chocolate and it was really rich and creamy. Perfect for cooling off on a hot sunny day.

The atmosphere was fantastic. Nice vibes and musics being played. The staff were very friendly too. Superb place to start a day in Tirana.

reviews.name: Volkan Sarsan
reviews.text: Kaldığımız yerin hemen karşısındaydı, çok tatlı bir kahveci. Sokak oldukça sakin, kahveni alıp kapı önünde keyifle oturabiliyorsun. Kahveler gerçekten çok lezzetliydi, çalışanlar da çok ilgili ve güleryüzlü. Biz çok sevdik
reviews.textTranslated: It was right across from where we were staying, a really lovely coffee shop. The street was quite quiet, you could grab your coffee and sit comfortably outside. The coffees were really delicious, and the staff were very attentive and friendly. We loved it!

reviews.name: Kübra Kolçak Sarsan
reviews.text: Coffee Lab’da espresso içtim ve gerçekten aroması oldukça başarılıydı. Denediğimiz diğer kahveleri de çok lezzetliydi. Fiyatlar çok uygundu. Ortamı sessiz ve sakin, oturup kahvenizi keyifle içebileceğiniz çok güzel bir yer. Kahve severlerin mutlaka uğraması gereken bir nokta ☕️
reviews.textTranslated: I had an espresso at Coffee Lab and the aroma was truly excellent. The other coffees we tried were also delicious. The prices were very reasonable. The atmosphere is quiet and peaceful, a lovely place to sit and enjoy your coffee. A must-visit spot for coffee lovers ☕️

reviews.name: Mykola
reviews.text: Very nice place. Tasty coffee and atmosphere are cool.

reviews.name: Doug Kyle
reviews.text: Had a croissant and coffee here shortly after opening. The croissant was right out of the oven and I had to let it cool down (now that is fresh!), the coffee was excellent. And the seating and vibes were comfortable and relaxed. Wifi was fast as well (speedtest pegged it at 159mbs).

reviews.name: Annika Agradi
reviews.text: Der Kaffee ist gut, im Vergleich zu anderen Orten vielleicht etwas teurer, aber für umgerechnet 1€ für einen Espresso und 1,80€ für einen Latte ist absolut nichts auszusetzen. Der Besitzer war sehr freundlich und das Ambiente ebenfalls sehr schön!
reviews.textTranslated: The coffee is good, perhaps a bit more expensive compared to other places, but at the equivalent of €1 for an espresso and €1.80 for a latte, there's absolutely nothing to complain about. The owner was very friendly and the atmosphere was also very nice!

title: 505 Café
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by phone call 1 week ago

reviews.name: Klajdi Grizhja
reviews.text: Loved the vibe . The coffee is excellent, the atmosphere is cozy and aesthetic, and it’s one of those places where you can actually relax for hours. The staff is friendly, the music is good, and the whole café has a unique personality that makes it stand out from typical coffee spots in Tirana. Perfect for coffee, conversations, or even getting some work done. Definitely one of the coolest cafés in the city.

reviews.name: joena
reviews.text: very cute place

reviews.name: Reem A
reviews.text: Very nice staff, love the ambiance and coffee taste amazing. Definitely recommend! And really reasonable prices!

reviews.name: Coffee Guide
reviews.text:
A charming coffee shop with a thoughtfully curated interior, located in central Tirana. The coffee and croissant were excellent. Service was attentive and friendly.

This is truly a place with soul — it’s about more than just coffee.

reviews.name: Anxhela GR
reviews.text: Such a cute and cozy spot! The service was excellent, and I really enjoyed both the drinks and desserts. The atmosphere has a great vibe, definitely a place I’d highly recommend.

reviews.name: Travel and Booking
reviews.text: Ich mag den Ort zum Energie Tanken. Nette Gespräche ,tolles Ambiente - Arctic Monkeys Fan - sehr freundliche Bedienung und geschmackvoller Kaffee Rund um ein guter Start in den Tag. Ich komme gerne wieder.
reviews.textTranslated: I love this place to recharge. Pleasant conversations, a great atmosphere – I'm an Arctic Monkeys fan – very friendly service and delicious coffee – all in all, a great start to the day. I'll definitely be back.

reviews.name: Fortesa Mujaj
reviews.text: I tried the Tiramisu Latte and absolutely loved it! It was perfectly balanced, creamy, and full of flavor. Definitely would order again.☕️

updatesFromCustomers.text: Great iced latte and perfect morning vibes. 🤩 also great music!

reviews.name: orges karaj
reviews.text: Sherbim super I mire nga Anja! 😍
reviews.textTranslated: Super good service from Anja! 😍

reviews.name: noldi broqi
reviews.text: Lum biznesi juaj per punetoren ANJA, sa here qe une vij, vi vetem per anjen.
reviews.textTranslated: Good luck with your business, ANJA, every time I come, I only come for ANJA.

reviews.name: Muhammad “Ray” Rahman
reviews.text: lovely place for a quick coffee and drink! (no food available so be aware!

reviews.name: Mo Wang
reviews.text: A perfectly crafted cappuccino in a peaceful setting. It gives a wholesome neighborhood vibe but with a coffee quality to beat any of the posh cafes charging twice the price. I can see why they have such a high rating. 💫

reviews.name: AC
reviews.text: Nice neighborhood atmosphere! Lovely corner of the city!

reviews.name: sarah turner
reviews.text: Friendly service, decent coffee and they helped me with the WiFi password.

reviews.name: Arnolda Shira
reviews.text: Streha is a unique and welcoming spot that stands out from typical cafés. The atmosphere is very warm, cozy, creative vibe that reflects its community-focused mission.

reviews.name: Artea Zera
reviews.text: My friends and I got together randomly at this cafe and were pleasantly surprised. The place was very cozy, the decor was tasteful and our server was very friendly as well. Our cocktails were delightful. I would wholeheartedly recommend.

title: Mulliri i Vjetër - (Shallvaret)
address: Rruga Deshmorët e 4 Shkurtit, Tiranë, Albania

peopleAlsoSearch.title: Mulliri i Vjetër - Rruga Myslym Shyri & Sami Frashëri

reviews.name: Paul
reviews.text: Went here every day for two weeks while visiting Tirane. Great coffee and croissants! Very nice staff.

reviews.name: Piergiuseppe Laera (PL)
reviews.text:
Caffè ottimo e servizio veloce e impeccabile.
Ottima la colazione
reviews.textTranslated:
Excellent coffee and fast, impeccable service.
Excellent breakfast.

reviews.name: Moyo S
reviews.text:
Attended for brunch
Lovely food

reviews.name: Gabrielle Collier
reviews.text: Had a lovely brunch, the food was very tasty and drinks hit the spot. The staff were super friendly too!

reviewContext.Vegetarian options: Lots of good options and very helpful staff!

reviews.name: Ofelia Hallgren
reviews.text: Underbart ställe! SÅ gott kaffe och frukost. Jättetrevlig personal(Greta). Vi kommer garanterat tillbaka!
reviews.textTranslated: Wonderful place! SO good coffee and breakfast. Very nice staff (Greta). We will definitely be back!

reviews.name: Agnes Hallgren
reviews.text:
Vårat favoritställe i hela Tirana. Mysig uteservering, underbart kaffe, god frukost/brunch. Servicen är otrolig.
Greta är så trevlig och söt!!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Our favorite place in all of Tirana. Cozy outdoor seating, wonderful coffee, good breakfast/brunch. The service is incredible.
Greta is so nice and sweet!!!

reviews.name: Vilma Sema
reviews.text: Tasty brunch, excellent coffee, and a modern atmosphere. Definitely worth visiting🥰

reviews.name: Ana Alcani
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience at Mulliri Gourmet. The staff was incredibly friendly, professional, and attentive throughout my visit. The atmosphere was warm, relaxing, and beautifully designed, making it a perfect place to enjoy a meal or coffee. The food was fresh, delicious, and presented with great care. Everything exceeded my expectations, and I would definitely recommend Mulliri Gourmet to anyone looking for quality service and a great dining experience.

reviews.name: Laurenz Licht
reviews.text: There was some confusion about our order, which was rather difficult to solve for a cafe of this size. Restroom was out of toilet paper

reviews.name: Introbit Creative
reviews.text: Ambjent mjaft i frekuemtuar sidomos nga të rinjtë

title: HANA Corner Café - Specialty Coffee and Brunch
address: Rruga Gjin Bue Shpata 4, Tiranë 1001, Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: A busy Sunday after a holiday filled week at this specialty coffee shop in Tirana. Best plant based milk options in Tirana, wonderful vibes and amazing music. 👏

images.authorName: HANA Corner Café - Speciality Coffee and Brunch
HANA Corner Café - Speciality Coffee and Brunch

reviews.name: Brandon Marquez
reviews.text:
Hana Corner Cafe is truly one of Tirana’s gems. From the moment you walk in, the atmosphere feels vibrant, welcoming, and full of life. It has a creative, cozy energy that makes it just as perfect for brunch with friends as it is for a coffee break, a casual drink, or a relaxed afternoon out. I also really appreciate that it is a genuinely queer friendly space, which adds to the overall feeling of comfort and inclusivity.

Their drink menu is one of the highlights. They offer a great range of craft drinks, from well made coffee to creative cocktails, so it works beautifully whether you are starting your day or easing into the evening. The daily brunch menu has also been recently updated, and the added variety really shows. There are thoughtful options for different tastes and dietary restrictions, which makes it easy to recommend to almost anyone.

The staff are consistently amazing. Everyone I have interacted with has been kind, helpful, and welcoming. They are happy to answer questions, make recommendations, and make the whole experience feel easy and enjoyable.

A helpful note for visitors: Hana Corner Cafe is cash only. If you need an ATM, the staff can point you to one nearby. Paying in Lek is the better option since the Euro conversion is not ideal, but they do accept Euro when needed, which is still a nice plus.

Overall, Hana Corner Cafe is a warm, colorful, inclusive spot with great drinks, delicious brunch, and genuinely wonderful people. It is the kind of place that quickly becomes a favorite, and I would happily recommend it to anyone looking for a special cafe experience in Tirana. Easily 5 stars.

reviews.name: Imran Ghani
reviews.text: I have to say the lady was very kind and super friendly. She could understand everything in English which was helpful. We had some really nice coffee and yogurt. The vegetarian sandwich was so good, you can tell how fresh everything was from the first bite, so good I had to order another one for myself. Very good prices too considering it's right in the center.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you very much! We hope to welcome you again.

reviews.name: Harald Paulsen
reviews.text: Sehr guter Cappuccino, nettes Personal, aber nur in to-go Pappbechern :-(, deshalb nur drei Sterne
reviews.textTranslated: Very good cappuccino, friendly staff, but only served in to-go paper cups :-(, therefore only three stars
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad you enjoyed our cappuccino and our staff. As for the cups we actually are a takeaway coffee shop, so drinks are normally served in paper cups. You are welcome anytime.

Great coffee, super friendly people and very fair prices. Cozy atmosphere and the perfect place to relax for a moment while exploring the city.

Definitely coming back next time.

reviews.name: Hasan Efe Kayık
reviews.text: Bizi hep güler yüzü ile karşılayan İrini mekana gelmemizi daha da etken kıldı. Yolunuz düşerse uğrayın ve İrini’den kahve için….

reviews.name: Ayhan Kaya
reviews.text: Güler yüzlü çalışanlar ile birlikte bizi hep güler yüzü ile karşılayan İrini mekana gelmemizi daha da etken kıldı. Yolunuz düşerse uğrayın ve İrini’den kahve için….
reviews.textTranslated: The friendly staff, along with Irini, who always greeted us with a smile, made us want to come back even more. If you're ever in the area, stop by and have a coffee at Irini's...

reviews.name: Marvin Diogo
reviews.text:
We visited the restaurant yesterday for breakfast with a group of 7 people, and we were all absolutely impressed. The food was excellent – fresh, delicious, and beautifully presented. We also really liked the location: a lovely atmosphere where you immediately feel comfortable.
We would especially like to highlight the service. Aferdita was extremely friendly, attentive, and incredibly welcoming. You could really tell that she enjoys her job and treats guests with genuine kindness. She made our visit even more enjoyable.
We all felt very welcome and will definitely come back again. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Totila Kuqi
reviews.text: Ambjent fantastik 👏👏
reviews.textTranslated: Fantastic environment 👏👏

reviews.name: aleksandra1t
reviews.text: During my stay in Albania this place has become some sort of my comfort place, as it’s close to my hotel and price wise very affordable - cause of all that they saw me there everyday. The food is tasty, staff is exceptionally friendly and the vibes are there.

reviews.name: Iron Dude
reviews.text: The food was ok but not great. Service was decent but rather slow. I wouldn't recommend this place due to the prices. Also waited 15min+ for the bill that was annoying since the place wasn't busy at all and we wanted to move on.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.name: Gianna De Cosmis
reviews.text: Esperienza unica, ogni volta che vengo a Tirana è una tappa fissa. Il cornetto al pistacchio una vera goduria e  il personale gentilissimo!!!! Provare per credere!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: A unique experience, it's a must-visit every time I come to Tirana. The pistachio croissant is a real treat, and the staff is incredibly kind! Try it and believe it!

reviews.name: Kerstin
reviews.text: Keine Kartenzahlung.
reviews.textTranslated: No card payments.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: There may have been a misunderstanding or a mix-up with another restaurant as we have accepted card payments since the first day we opened 9 years ago. Card payment has always been available at our restaurant.

reviews.name: Sabela Berisha
reviews.text: The purple hair waitress was sooo nice and funny i never felt more welcomed it felt like a friend was bringing me breakfast and not some employee who gets paid to do so , cant wait to be back and be served by her

reviews.name: Ezgi Alkışoğlu
reviews.text: Everyone was very helpful. We came almost every day during our trip. I highly recommend Tony's special egg.Everything was wonderful. Thank you so much.

reviews.name: Dennis Drijver
reviews.text: Hier een koffie gedaan. Deze waren prima!
reviews.textTranslated: Had a coffee here. They were great!

reviews.name: Mariama Jammeh kinteh
reviews.text:
We had a wonderful experience at Tony’s Restaurant. The staff were very attentive from the moment we arrived, making us feel welcomed and well looked after throughout our visit.
The food was delicious , well presented, and full of flavour.
Overall, great atmosphere, great service, and excellent food. I would definitely recommend Tony’s Restaurant and will be coming back again.

reviews.name: Kafree JK
reviews.text:
​Tony's was the very first restaurant we visited when we arrived, and it has been our absolute favorite ever since! The food is amazing, but the staff is even more incredible. They truly made us feel at home and always welcomed us with the biggest smiles. Honestly, if you come to Tirana, you cannot miss out on Tony's!

​Faleminderit family, we are going to miss you so much, but we will be back very soon! Të dua! ❤️

reviews.name: Levi Hoonings
reviews.text: The food is so good! Big portions for a very good price. We had some mexican burito and chicken fajita. It was amazing!
